@startuml
participant producer
participant consumer
participant broker
participant NameServer

participant NameServer1
participant NameServer2

NameServer1..>NameServer2 : 启动监听

NameServer1..>broker : 启动 broker 服务器

broker..>NameServer1 : 每个 broker 与每个 NameServer 建立长链接

broker..>NameServer2 : 每个 broker 与每个 NameServer 建立长链接

broker..>NameServer1 : 每 30 秒发送心跳

broker..>NameServer2 : 每 30 秒发送心跳

NameServer1..>producer : 启动

NameServer1..>consumer : 启动

NameServer1..>broker : 获取路由信息，获取 topic 与 broker queue 的对应关系

NameServer1..>broker : 每 30 秒更新一次路由信息

NameServer1..>broker : 监听 broker 链接

NameServer1..>broker : 监听 producer 链接

NameServer1..>broker : 监听 consumer 链接
